scripts.ios:add: npm run build && npx cap add ios --packagemanager SPM
scripts.ios:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync ios
scripts.ios:build: npm run ios:sync && xcodebuild -project ios/App/App.xcodeproj -scheme App -configuration Debug -sdk iphonesimulator -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' -derivedDataPath build/ios CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
scripts.ios:open: npm run ios:sync && npx cap open ios
scripts.ios:run: npm run ios:sync && npx cap run ios
